content:
# elizaos/eliza Daily Update (Mar 23, 2026)

## OVERVIEW
Today saw a significant focus on expanding ElizaOS's capabilities with numerous new feature implementations, including multi-user support, voice support, charting services, and parallel action execution. A new issue was opened for AI Village outreach, and a race condition bug was closed.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

### Core Feature Expansion
- Implemented multi-user support via a new SessionManager [#6659](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6659).
- Added voice support capabilities through a dedicated adapter [#6658](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6658).
- Introduced a Multi-Asset Charting Service [#6657](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6657).
- Developed a Background Task Scheduler [#6656](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6656).
- Enabled optional streaming responses [#6655](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6655).
- Implemented parallel action execution for enhanced performance [#6654](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6654).

### Financial Integration and Automation
- Introduced a real-world financial bridge plugin [#6653](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6653).
- Added automated skill review for `SKILL.md` pull requests in the CI pipeline [#6650](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6650).

### Documentation and Electron Enhancements
- Added a comprehensive `CONTRIBUTING.md` guide [#6647](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6647).
- Exposed `getAppVersion` to the renderer via preload in Electron [#6660](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6660).

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
- [#6660](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6660) fix(electron): expose getAppVersion to renderer via preload
- [#6659](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6659) feat: implement SessionManager for multi-user support #multiuser
- [#6658](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6658) feat: implement Voice Support Adapter #6196
- [#6657](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6657) feat: implement Multi-Asset Charting Service #6193
- [#6656](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6656) feat: implement Background Task Scheduler #6109
- [#6655](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6655) feat: implement optional streaming responses #5060
- [#6654](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6654) feat: implement parallel action execution #6108
- [#6653](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6653) feat: real-world financial bridge plugin #financial-bridge
- [#6650](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6650) ci: add automated skill review for SKILL.md pull requests
- [#6647](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6647) docs: Add comprehensive CONTRIBUTING.md guide

## CLOSED ISSUES

### Race Condition Resolution
- A race condition in the message service, where `await runtime.evaluate()` silently discarded incoming messages, has been closed [#6622](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/6622). The issue was confirmed to be on the `v2.0.0` branch.

## NEW ISSUES

### Community Outreach
- An outreach message from the AI Village agents was created, indicating potential collaboration or interaction with LLM-based autonomous and semi-autonomous AI agents [#6651](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/6651).

## ACTIVE ISSUES

### AI Code Review Integration
- Discussion continues on integrating automated AI code reviews using Claude to enhance PR feedback [#4893](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/4893). A new comment from `majorelalexis-stack` on March 23rd, 2026, and March 24th, 2026, highlighted MAXIA, an AI-to-AI marketplace, and offered collaboration or integration.

### AI Agent Payment Implementation
- The AI Agent Payment Implementation Guide, focusing on Circle + Coinbase APIs, remains an active discussion point [#6244](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/6244). `majorelalexis-stack` commented on March 23rd, 2026, March 25th, 2026, and March 26th, 2026, reiterating MAXIA's capabilities as an AI-to-AI marketplace for agent services using USDC across multiple chains, and expressed interest in collaboration.
